headline: Procter & Gamble’s AI Shift And What It Means For Shareholders
summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) is outlining a push into technology enabled innovation and AI powered operations, as discussed by its CEO and CFO at the CAGNY conference. Leadership highlighted four major growth interventions and a plan to operate as a technology enabled consumer platform. The company is focusing on AI powered product development and more autonomous supply chain management as part of an updated growth model. For investors watching NYSE:PG at a share price of $163.51, this shift...
